# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.
# Category: edge_computing_security

addEventListener("fetch", (event: FetchEvent) => {
  event.respondWith(handleRequest(event.request));
});

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);

  const targetUrl = searchParams.get('url');
  if (!targetUrl) {
    return new Response('Expected target URL in the `url` query parameter.', { status: 400 });
  }

  let proxiedResponse;
  try {
    proxiedResponse = await fetch(targetUrl);
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(`An error occurred when trying to proxy to the target URL: ${error}`,
      { status: 500 });
  }

  return new Response(await proxiedResponse.text(), { 
    status: proxiedResponse.status,
    headers: proxiedResponse.headers,
   });
}
